title: Chio HTTP Session Resume
description: Persisted session-resume record used to re-attach a remote MCP session after edge restart or transport reconnection. Mirrors the serde-derived `RemoteSessionResumeRecord` struct in `crates/chio-cli/src/remote_mcp/session_core.rs` lines 223-240. The record is signed by `RemoteSessionResumeIntegrityEnvelope` (lines 1611+) and validated on the load path. NOTE: M07 may re-pin the cross-cluster fields; M08 may extend lifecycle snapshot semantics.

agent_id.description: Agent identifier the session is bound to.

auth_context.description: Authentication context as captured at session creation. Mirrors `chio_core::session::SessionAuthContext`; treated as opaque object here pending dedicated chio-http schema.

auth_mode_fingerprint.description: Optional opaque fingerprint of the auth-mode configuration. `#[serde(default, skip_serializing_if = "Option::is_none")]`.

policy_fingerprint.description: Optional opaque fingerprint of the policy bundle. `#[serde(default, skip_serializing_if = "Option::is_none")]`.

hosted_isolation.description: Hosted-isolation mode for the session. Mirrors the snake_case enum `RemoteHostedIsolationMode`.

lifecycle.description: Lifecycle snapshot recorded at suspend time. Mirrors `RemoteSessionLifecycleSnapshot` in `session_core.rs` lines 338-345.

state.description: Session state at the time of the snapshot. Enum string values mirror `RemoteSessionState::as_str` in `session_core.rs` lines 326-335.

created_at.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) when the session was created.

last_seen_at.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) of the most recent activity recorded for the session.

idle_expires_at.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) at which the session becomes idle-expired.

drain_deadline_at.description: Optional Unix timestamp (seconds) by which an in-progress drain must complete.

protocol_version.description: Negotiated MCP protocol version at session-init time.

peer_capabilities.description: Peer capabilities recorded at session-init time. Mirrors `chio_core::session::PeerCapabilities`; treated as opaque object here pending dedicated peer-capabilities schema.

initialize_params.description: Verbatim JSON-RPC `initialize` params object as supplied by the client at session-init time.

issued_capabilities.description: Capability tokens issued to the session. Mirrors `Vec<chio_core::capability::CapabilityToken>`; element shape pinned by chio-wire/v1/capability/token.schema.json.

resume_integrity_tag.description: Optional MAC tag computed by `RemoteSessionResumeIntegrityEnvelope` over the resume record (see `session_core.rs` lines 1611+). `#[serde(default, skip_serializing_if = "Option::is_none")]`.
